notes:
Ember 1.11.0 — Ember can hear songs, and can extend itself

• "What song is this?" — in voice chat, Ember now listens to the music playing and names the track (Shazam-style fingerprint). A plain voice model just talks over the song; Ember actually identifies it.
• Ember can write itself new abilities: if it's missing a capability you ask for, it can author a new tool on the spot, and use it in the same conversation. New code is shown to you and approved once, then runs automatically. It can also read and edit its own source (when you run Ember from source).
• Download protection popup with one-click AI scan + quarantine (front-and-centre, auto-quarantines malware).
• Ember Search shows web results instantly while the AI answer loads.
• Ember Browser: links that open in a new tab (target=_blank / window.open) now work — they were being silently dropped.

Song ID uses the optional voice deps (pip install -r requirements-voice.txt) or an AUDD_API_TOKEN.
